jiuwen.core.graph#

Executable#

class jiuwen.core.graph.Executable(Generic[Input, Output])#

Abstract base class for all invokable graph nodes.

Methods

async on_invoke(inputs: Input, **kwargs) -> Output

Execute with batch input, return batch output.

async on_stream(inputs: Input, **kwargs) -> AsyncIterator[Output]

Execute with batch input, yield streaming output.

async on_collect(inputs: AsyncIterator[Input], **kwargs) -> Output

Collect streaming input, return batch output.

async on_transform(inputs: AsyncIterator[Input], **kwargs) -> AsyncIterator[Output]

Transform streaming input to streaming output.

skip_trace() → bool#
post_commit() → bool#
component_type() → str#

PregelGraph#

class jiuwen.core.graph.PregelGraph#

Concrete graph builder. Construct DAGs with nodes and edges.

add_node(node_id: str, node: Executable, *, wait_for_all: bool = False) → Self#
add_edge(source_node_id: str | list[str], target_node_id: str) → Self#
add_conditional_edges(source_node_id: str, router: Router) → Self#
start_node(node_id: str) → Self#
end_node(node_id: str) → Self#
compile(session=None, **kwargs) → ExecutableGraph#
get_nodes() → dict#

Channels#

class jiuwen.core.graph.Channel#

Abstract base for message channels.

is_ready() → bool#
accept(message) → bool#
consume() → None#
snapshot() → Any#
restore(state) → None#
class jiuwen.core.graph.TriggerChannel(node_name: str)#

Fires when any message arrives (OR gate).

class jiuwen.core.graph.BarrierChannel(node_name: str, expected_senders: Set[str])#

Fires when all expected senders have arrived (AND gate).

Types#

jiuwen.core.graph.Router: Callable[..., Hashable | Sequence[Hashable]] | Callable[..., Awaitable[Hashable | Sequence[Hashable]]]#
jiuwen.core.graph.GeneralExecutor: Executable[dict[str, Any], dict[str, Any]]#
